CHAR 2 x x x x x x
M1880_CU_PREP_MEAL M1880 (M0720) Current Preparing Light Meals This field indicates the patient's current ability to plan and prepare light meals safely. 00 = (a) Able to independently plan and prepare all light meals for self or reheat delivered meals; OR (b) Is physically, cognitively, and mentally able to prepare light meals on a regular basis but has not routinely performed light meal preparation in the past (i.e., prior to this home care admission).
01 = Unable to
